text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One gets injured during training, so I quickly
escort her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ow! My bad! I screwed that up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And ya don't even need to tell me. Ya want me to
rest for a while, right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But ya know I'm not one to sit around twiddlin' my
thumbs.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I can push through a li'l pain. So why not lemme
press on with the special trainin'?
choice_data_list:
Let's try to think of something we can do
together.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd say that...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd say that...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Nothin' I can do about it, then. I'll sit tight, rest
up, and think of it as a kinda patience trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I'm not gonna do anythin' reckless
like trainin' in secret.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One goes back to her dorm with a miserable
look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh, so ya won't lemme carry all the
responsibility alone, huh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There's nothin' more reassurin' than to have you
backin' me up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There's nothin' more reassurin' than to have you
backin' me up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All right then! Let's get back to trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: One, two, three... OW!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh for—all I did was a li' stretchin', and it hurts
like hell! Howzat fair?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
My bad, Boss. I probably should try not to do
anythin' reckless...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
My bad, Boss. I probably should try not to do
anythin' reckless...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to cut Inari One's training short and have
her focus on her recovery.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: One, two, threeeee!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I might be a li'l injured, but it looks like
some light exercise won't hurt!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If I keep this up till I'm fully healed, I won't have
to worry 'bout gettin' rusty. Nice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While monitoring her injury, Inari One completes
a light training session.
